options.text: Oh wow, hiking? I heard the trails near Blue Mountain are amazing this season.
You're going hiking? That's so cool!
I love hiking, do you have a favorite trail?

content.explanation: 正确答案 "Oh wow, hiking? I heard the trails near Blue Mountain are amazing this season." 是因为它直接回应了服务方的问候并询问了相关信息。选项 2 "You're going hiking? That's so cool!" 不直接回应服务方的问候。选项 3 "What's the weather like today?" 不相关于服务方的问候。选项 4 "I love hiking, do you have a favorite trail?" 不直接回应服务方的问候。
content.scenarioHint: 熟人相遇，自然开启话题，服务方先打招呼并询问顾客需求

options.text: Hey! Long time no see—how’ve you been?
What do you need help with?
Can you tell me your name?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Hey! Long time no see—how’ve you been?' 是熟人偶遇时自然、亲切的寒暄方式，符合场景需求。选项2 'What do you need help with?' 适用于服务场景，过于正式且不适用于朋友间闲聊。选项3 'Have you eaten yet?' 虽是常见问候，但更偏向文化特定语境（如中国），在通用英语口语中不够自然。选项4 'Can you tell me your name?' 暗示不认识对方，与‘熟人’前提矛盾。
content.scenarioHint: 你和一位好久不见的熟人在街上偶遇，想自然地开启对话，表达关心并延续聊天。

options.text: I've been learning to cook Italian food—last week I made lasagna from scratch!

content.explanation: 正确答案提供了具体、生动的细节（学做意大利菜、亲手做千层面），符合寒暄中‘用细节回应’的要求。选项1和3过于模糊，选项4语气生硬，像在质问，不适合友好开场。
content.speakerText: Hi Sarah! It’s been ages. What have you been up to lately?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，Sarah！好久不见，最近在忙什么？
